mapper.select: SELECT p.POST_ID AS postId, p.CATEGORY_ID AS categoryId, c.CATEGORY_CD AS categoryCd, c.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, p.USER_ID AS userId, p.NICKNAME AS nickname, p.TITLE AS title, p.CONTENT AS content, p.IS_NOTICE AS isNotice, p.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, p.LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, p.SCRAP_COUNT AS scrapCount, p.CS_CATEGORY_ID AS csCategoryId, c.IS_SCRAPABLE AS isScrapable, p.DELETED_YN AS deletedYn, p.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, p.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT WHERE POST_ID = p.POST_ID AND DELETED_YN = 'N') AS commentCount FROM COMMUNITY_POST p JOIN COMMUNITY_CATEGORY c ON p.CATEGORY_ID = c.CATEGORY_ID WHERE p.POST_ID = #{postId} AND p.DELETED_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_POST ( CATEGORY_ID, USER_ID, NICKNAME, TITLE, CONTENT, CS_CATEGORY_ID, IS_NOTICE, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{nickname}, #{title}, #{content}, #{csCategoryId}, 'N', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY_POST SET CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}, TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, CS_CATEGORY_ID = #{csCategoryId}, UPDATED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_BY = #{userId} WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'
UPDATE COMMUNITY_POST SET VIEW_COUNT = #{viewCount}, UPDATED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_BY = 'SYSTEM' WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
UPDATE COMMUNITY_POST SET LIKE_COUNT = #{likeCount}, UPDATED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_BY = 'SYSTEM' WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
UPDATE COMMUNITY_POST SET SCRAP_COUNT = #{scrapCount}, UPDATED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_BY = 'SYSTEM' WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT VIEW_COUNT FROM COMMUNITY_POST WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'
